column1: sentence
the cat sat on the mat
the dog sat on the rug
the cat chased the mouse
the dog chased the cat
the mouse ran under the mat
a small cat sat on a small mat
the dog barked at the cat
the cat looked at the dog
a quiet mouse hid under the rug
the dog ran after the mouse
the cat and the dog sat on the mat
a small dog chased a small mouse
the mouse looked at the cat
the rug was under the mat
the cat slept on the warm mat
the dog slept near the warm rug
a curious cat watched the mouse
the mouse watched the sleeping cat
the dog and the cat became friends
a small mouse ran across the rug
